title: Weekend cricket fixtures
description: An exciting weekend of club cricket is on...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"An exciting weekend of club cricket is on the menu for this weekend. In the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier league all eight teams will be in action and Pacaltsdorp United, Union Stars I and Sussex will be the favourites to consolidate their positions for a place in the top three.","html":"An exciting weekend of club cricket is on the menu for this weekend. In the Six Gun Grill SWD Premier league all eight teams will be in action and Pacaltsdorp United, Union Stars I and Sussex will be the favourites to consolidate their positions for a place in the top three."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The fixtures for the weekend:","html":"The fixtures for the weekend:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday 7 December","html":"Saturday 7 December"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Premier League","html":"Premier League"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plett Pioneers vs Sussex, Union Stars II vs Harlequins Forces,","html":"Plett Pioneers vs
